steps.prompt: Read analysis/entities/{ticker}.md and .claude/rules/conviction-schema.md. Check Form 4, 8-K, price, short interest, and monitoring triggers for {ticker}. Trigger: {trigger}. If no conviction change warranted: update last_reviewed in frontmatter, commit with [entity-refresh] prefix, STOP. If conviction change warranted: write evidence summary to .claude/plans/deep-dive-{ticker}-evidence.md with specific data points, sources, and proposed conviction change.

Read .claude/plans/deep-dive-{ticker}-evidence.md (evidence from stage 1). Run thesis-check skill queries against {ticker}. If competing hypotheses exist, run ACH. Update analysis/entities/{ticker}.md: add conviction_journal entry to YAML frontmatter per .claude/rules/conviction-schema.md, update scenario table if present, update conviction: field to match new posterior. Run: uv run python3 tools/conviction_extractor.py --ticker {ticker} --validate. Commit with [conviction] prefix.
